title: AgentDefinition
description: Claude Code custom agent frontmatter and body

model.description: Model to use for this agent. opus=heavy reasoning, sonnet=balanced, haiku=fast+cheap

tools.description: Tools this agent can access (e.g., WebSearch, Read, Write, Bash, Agent)

role.description: One-line description of what this agent does (used for routing)

when_to_use.description: Description field in the agent — tells CC when to spawn this agent

body.description: The agent's system prompt / persona definition

cost_tier.description: Budget category. Heavy=opus for complex reasoning, Light=haiku for high-volume tasks

model_selection_guide.opus: Complex reasoning, nuanced judgment, creative generation, architecture decisions
model_selection_guide.sonnet: Research, analysis, code generation, balanced quality/cost
model_selection_guide.haiku: High-volume operations, simple transforms, status tracking, data extraction
